feat.name: Energize Bite
feat.requirement: Your most recent action was to use Breath of the Dragon.
feat.text: The deadly energy of your breath remains in your jaws to empower your attacks. Until the end of your turn, your jaws unarmed attack deals an extra 1d6 damage of a type matching that of your draconic benefactor. This ability has the trait associated with the type of damage it deals.

traits.name: Dragonblood
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dragonblood versatile heritage. These creatures are born of draconic lineage and often have draconic appearances.
